Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Deem Admitted Requests For Admissions, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Bernard P. Hagan
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Cesari, Werner and Moriarty's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is moot. The motion to deem certain matters admitted is denied. Responses have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of the responses but notes that the introductory statement and general objections are not authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure and should be stricken. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $640 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
